title: Europe Finds It Hard to Break Up With American and Chinese Technology
summary_full: France and Germany want to quit relying on America and China for key technology like artificial intelligence, but they’re having to choose where to do it.
summary_public: France and Germany want to quit relying on America and China for key technology like artificial intelligence, but they’re having to choose where to do it.
